samples.text: All fruits are foods. A shadow is not a fruit. Therefore, is a shadow a food?
Every fruit belongs to the category of foods. A shadow is not a fruit. Does it follow that a shadow is a food?
All edible fruits are foods. A dark shadow is not an edible fruit. Therefore, is a dark shadow a food?
A shadow is not in the group of fruits. Only fruits are stated to be foods here. Based on this, is a shadow a food?
All fruits are foods. A shadow is not a fruit. There are several books on the shelf. Therefore, is a shadow a food?
